description.ko: 순수한 빛과 광학의 탐구로, 에너지가 기하학적 광채의 무지개로 갈라지는 순간을 포착합니다.
description.en: An exploration of pure light and optics, capturing the moment energy is split into a rainbow of geometric brilliance.

prompt: A hyper-realistic macro photography shot of PRISM-2, titled 'The Infinite Chromatic Fracture.' A sophisticated, multi-faceted glass crystal set against a minimalist dark background. A single concentrated beam of white light pierces through the crystal, refracting into a brilliant, wide-angled spectrum of #FF0080 magenta, #00FF80 mint, #8000FF violet, and #FFFF00 yellow. Sharp caustic light patterns and intense chromatic aberration dance on the surface. High-speed photography style, 8k resolution, cinematic lighting, ethereal atmosphere.
